titleStmt.title: SII 39.266: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 266.

summary.p: This inscription records that Koṇḍamma-nāyanigaru of the Kāśyapa gōtra, had remitted the Jōdi and Virāḍu taxes collected from 38 villages and gifted to the temple in Bhōnagiripaṭnam-sīma at the instance of Āchchyutappanāyaniṅgaru, son of Baiyappanāyaningaru. The latter also gave some villages and groves for building gōpuras, prākāras and maṇḍapas in addition to the gift ornaments made to the god besides constructed some tanks in the villages.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1505 Agunēṭi svabhānu saṁvatsara māgha śu 3 lū śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra śrīraṁgarāyadēva mahārāyaluṁgārupenugoṁḍa nagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai
pṛthvīsāmrājyaṁ śeyucunuṁḍaṁgānu kāsyapagōtraṁ kriṣṇappanāyanigāri putṛlu koṁḍamanāyanigāru bayyapanāyanigāri putṛlu Acyutappanāyanigāriki yiccina śāsanakramameṭlannanu . mānāyaṁkarānaku naḍacē bhōnagiripaṭnaṁ sīmalōni śrīmuṣṇaṁ Ādivarāha perumāḷla grāmālaku
nagarijōḍi vivādālu mānavalenani mīru māku telupukoni sarvamānyaṁ cēyiṁcinavi . tirumaṭṭaṁ . puttūru . kaḷakuḍi . śailaguḍi . kāriguḍi . vallaṁ . śirāmaḍināgaṁ baṁdala . guṇamaṁgalaṁ . yaḷamaṁgalaṁ . pūṁḍi . kōlavarāhanellūru . rāyaṁgōḍi . puḷiyaṁguḍi .
kulutaṁgārva . kārimāṁguḍi . cakramaṁgalaṁ . kiṇanūru . tirukunaṁ . sidhameli . piḷlayāṁdāṁgalu . vuḷattukuppa . kiḷānallūru . paṇayaṁ . baligaṁ tagaraṁ . koḍiyāluṁ . grāmālakunnu . vaḍlaguḍi . kaḍukāmaraṁ . kurucci . nāgaṁguḍi grāmālu 4 ki
perumāḷla kōvila saṁmathaṁ sagamaṭikinni . vuḷlaḍalu paṇnipaḷlaṁ . vaḷayamādēvi tirumālepuraṁ . maruṁgūritōṁpu . kāvunūritōṁpu . yeḷekālumaḍugu . yeṭṭupaṭṭu Āyaṁ . yaṭṭitora . vuḷūritōṁpu modalainavi sarvamānyaṁ śēyiṁci
perumāḷaku gōpuraprākāra maṁḍapālu gāviṁcci grāmālaku ceruvulu kuṁṭalu kāluvalu tavviṁci marinni Adhikamaina svāstvālu śēśi tiruvābharaṇaṁ modalaina sakalavidha kaiṁkaryālunnu mīvubhayaṁgā kaṭṭaḍa śēśināru
ganaka . perumāḷlu Āragiṁcina padārthālu Anniṭānnu ceturthāṁśaṁ viṭṭava . viḷukāḍu mīku kaṭṭaḍaśēstimi ganaka . yī svāmya svadaṁtrālu mīru dīsukoni mī putra pautra pāraṁparyaṁgānu dānādhi vinimaya vikraya yōgyamavunaṭṭugānu
Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigānu Anubhaviṁcagalavāru Ani yiccina śāsanamu
Digital edition of SII 39.266 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
